title: Crisis in the Spirit World
overview: Dimension stone, which maintains peace and harmony between the spirit world, the real world and the Internet cyber world gets stolen, so A-jang and friends go to cyber world to retrieve it.

title: Nana in the Fairy Tale Land
The Crisis on Ajang.com
overview: Pigu disguises as a woman in order to seduce Argo into revealing him on which website A-Jang hides and to turn of the firewall. Our heroes get trapped and taken to Lupin's base, but they fight back manage to win and take the dimension stone with them, which causes the base to blow up. All seems well, and our heroes happily return to the spirit world knowing they return peace and natural order of things, but is the fight really done?

title: The End of the Thief Lupin
overview: Lupin survives the base explosion. Virus consumes him completely & transform into an entirely new shape. While A-Jang & the gang celebrate victory, Lupin gpes to his house to get a time machine he stole long ago so he could return to the past to the day he stole the Dimension stone and have his revenge on A-jang.
